title: Panjab University B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester Result 2026 Declared

detail.title: Panjab University B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester Result 2026 Declared
detail.short_info: Panjab University Result 2026 : Panjab University Result 2026 has been released on puchd.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester Results Online.

sections.heading: Panjab University B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester Result 2026 Declared

content.text: Panjab University has declared the B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester Result 2026 on March 03, 2026. The results belong to the 2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the Panjab University exam portal.

These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official Panjab University website at puchd.ac.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Panjab University has published the latest B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester results on its official website for the 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

The university has activated the direct link for checking B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

rows: Panjab University B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester Result 2026

sections.heading: How to Check Panjab University Results 2026 Online?

content.text: Panjab University has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website — Go to the official Panjab University exam portal at puchd.ac.in.
Find the Results Section — Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam — Choose B.Sc, MBA 1st Semester from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details — Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View — Click the Submit button to view your Panjab University result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet — Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details — Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.
